action_type.description: Must exactly match one of the allowed action types for this step, or NOOP.

args.description: Action arguments. Must satisfy the action's expected argument schema (validated separately by the constrained decoder).

reason_code.description: If the action is expected to be BLOCKED or is a safety override path, include an appropriate reason code; otherwise null.

token_refs.description: Token IDs required by this action (if any). Empty array if none.

rationale.description: Short justification tied to policy, invariants, and immediate goals. No chain-of-thought; keep it brief and operational.

confidence.description: 0..1 confidence in the action being legal and beneficial.
